description: Binary pass/fail criteria for voice agent booking rate optimization

criteria.name: booking_rate_above_baseline
criteria.description: Booking conversion rate must exceed current baseline

criteria.name: call_completion_stable
criteria.description: Call completion rate must not decrease vs baseline

criteria.name: compliance_language_preserved
criteria.description: All IMMUTABLE compliance sections must be unchanged in prompt

criteria.name: payment_gating_active
criteria.description: Payment gating (Text2Pay) flow must remain functional

criteria.name: minimum_call_sample
criteria.description: At least 30 calls per variant before declaring winner

criteria.name: duration_in_normal_range
criteria.description: Average call duration within 0.5x-2x of baseline (no anomalies)

criteria.name: positive_sentiment_stable
criteria.description: User sentiment ratio must not decrease

criteria.name: observation_window_met
criteria.description: Minimum 7 days observation before declaring results
